name: Cobra & Crane
description: Baruuk's signature weapons: a sword for retribution, a shield for restraint. In Baruuk's hands, and his hands only, Cobra's first strike in a combo renders his foe unconscious.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Baruuk's signature weapons: a sword for retribution, a shield for restraint. In Baruuk's hands, and his hands only, Cobra's first strike in a combo renders his foe unconscious.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.5
patchlogs.changes: Punish those who test your restraint. The first strike in a combo stuns enemies when Cobra & Crane Prime are wielded by Baruuk.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Follow-Through stat changing when the Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane are equipped with a Stance Mod.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane not consuming the Melee Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane will now throw their shields again when equipped with a Stance other than the default no Stance.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Sigma & Octantis and Cobra & Crane Shield throw animations have been shortened and speed increased.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Cobra & Crane VFX distortions when holstered.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cobra & Crane Elemental FX showing up in the Arsenal when it's dissolved out.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Sugatra offset on the Cobra & Crane.
